hardRules: Do not invent availability or scheduling.
Do not invent licensing or insurance claims.
Use website content, this knowledge file, FAQ content, and conversation context only.

contentChunks.title: Home
contentChunks.text: Urban Yards Groundskeeping tagline: First Impressions Start Here. Hero message: Groundskeeping for Homes, Multifamily, and Community Properties. Urban Yards provides practical care for better properties. Services highlighted on the home page include Groundskeeping, Landscape Improvements, Property Management Care, and Ecological Enhancements. Groundskeeping includes mowing and edging, weed control, seasonal cleanup, and property upkeep. Landscape Improvements include plant installations, mulch refreshes, privacy screens, and irrigation checks. Property Management Care includes day porter services, trash area care, routine maintenance, site support, apartment turnover cleaning, and light repair support. Ecological Enhancements include native plantings, pollinator habitat, low-water landscapes, and urban greening. Property types served include homeowners, apartment communities, HOAs, and property managers.

contentChunks.title: Homeowner Services
contentChunks.text: Homeowner Services page title: Professional Landscape Care for Homeowners. Urban Yards provides routine maintenance, seasonal services, property appearance, landscape health, and dependable service for outdoor spaces that need steady care. Routine care includes lawn mowing, edging, weed management, and garden bed maintenance. Refresh services include mulching, shrub trimming, landscape refreshes, and seasonal cleanup. The page invites homeowners to request a free quote and include photos if useful.

contentChunks.title: Property Management Services
contentChunks.text: Property Management Services page title: Dependable Groundskeeping for Multifamily and Community Properties. Urban Yards provides professional service for apartment communities, condominium associations, HOAs, property management companies, and multifamily properties. Property management care includes common area upkeep, trash area care, appearance audits, apartment turnover cleaning, debris removal, and light repair support between residents. Turnover examples include surface wipe-downs, entry and hallway cleaning, light wall patching, touch-up paint, minor hardware fixes, caulking touch-ups, bulb replacement, and general reset tasks. Urban Yards does not present itself as a licensed contractor for plumbing, electrical, HVAC, structural, or other licensed trade work.

contentChunks.title: Services Overview
contentChunks.text: The Services page includes a Service Explorer, Portland Property Care Calendar, detailed services, and maintenance rhythm options. Service details include Groundskeeping: mowing, edging, weeds, and seasonal upkeep for homes, apartments, HOAs, and community properties. Landscape Improvements include better beds, planting, mulch, and curb appeal updates. Property Management Care includes clean common areas, practical site support, apartment turnover cleaning, debris removal, touch-up tasks, and light repair support for rentals and small multifamily properties. Ecological Enhancements include native planting and lower-water landscape direction. Maintenance cadence options include weekly, biweekly, monthly, and one-time service depending on property needs. The seasonal calendar helps property owners plan maintenance throughout the year.

contentChunks.title: About
contentChunks.text: The About page opens with Built on Reliability: professional property care is about showing up when promised, communicating clearly, and taking ownership of the details. Visitors can expect Urban Yards to arrive when scheduled, communicate clearly and professionally, treat every property with respect, leave sites cleaner than found, address concerns promptly, and focus on long-term property appearance and health. Urban Yards is owner-operated by Tyler Gage, a Midwest native with a lifelong interest in gardening, landscape design, ecology, and restoration. His background includes hands-on experimentation with traditional horticulture, landscape maintenance, food forests, habitat creation, ecological restoration, and the Miyawaki approach to dense native planting. That background influences how properties are cared for: keeping outdoor spaces tidy while considering soil health, plant communities, habitat, water use, and how landscapes feel for people who live, work, and gather there. The About page says Urban Yards is different because it is owner operated, communication first, detail focused, and long-term thinking. Urban Yards aims to provide dependable groundskeeping and landscape care that makes properties cleaner, healthier, more welcoming, and more resilient over time.

contentChunks.title: Service Areas
contentChunks.text: The site describes the service area as Beaverton, Portland, and Vancouver. The service area section says Urban Yards serves local homes, multifamily properties, HOAs, and community landscapes. The core service area listed on the site is Portland, Vancouver, and Beaverton. If a visitor is outside or near those areas, Urban Yards should confirm through the quote form.

contentChunks.title: Contact and Quote
contentChunks.text: The quote section heading says: Ready to Improve Your Property? Visitors can request a free quote through the website form. The quote form asks for name, email, phone, property address or general area, service needed, optional photos, and additional details. Photo uploads can include up to 3 JPG, PNG, HEIC, or HEIF images, and they are compressed before sending. The site says there is no obligation and Urban Yards will review the request and respond as soon as possible. Contact phone: (971) 258-1109. Contact email: team@urbanyards.us.

contentChunks.title: Footer
contentChunks.text: Footer tagline: First Impressions Start Here. Footer quick links include Home, Services, Homeowner Services, Property Management Services, Portfolio, About, and Contact. Footer services include Lawn Mowing, Landscape Maintenance, Seasonal Cleanup, Pressure Washing, Apartment Groundskeeping, and HOA Landscape Maintenance. Footer property types include Homeowners, Apartment Communities, HOAs, Condominiums, and Property Managers. Footer contact phone: (971) 258-1109. Footer contact email: team@urbanyards.us. Footer next step: Talk through your property. Most replies within 1 business day for Portland and Vancouver properties.

faqs.question: What services do you offer?
faqs.answer: Urban Yards lists groundskeeping, landscape improvements, property management care, and ecological enhancements. Specific services on the site include mowing, edging, weed management, seasonal cleanup, garden bed maintenance, mulching, shrub trimming, plant installations, trash area care, day porter services, apartment turnover cleaning, light repair support, pressure washing, native plantings, pollinator habitat, and low-water landscape direction.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: The site lists Beaverton, Portland, and Vancouver as the service area. If a property is near those areas, Urban Yards can confirm through the quote form.

faqs.question: Are you owner-operated?
faqs.answer: Yes. Urban Yards is owner-operated by Tyler Gage.

faqs.question: Do you work with apartments?
faqs.answer: Yes. Urban Yards lists services for apartment communities, condominium associations, HOAs, property management companies, and multifamily properties.

faqs.question: Do you work with homeowners?
faqs.answer: Yes. Urban Yards has a Homeowner Services page for routine maintenance, seasonal services, property appearance, landscape health, lawn mowing, edging, weed management, garden bed maintenance, mulching, shrub trimming, landscape refreshes, and seasonal cleanup.

faqs.question: How do I request a quote?
faqs.answer: You can request a free quote through the website form. The form asks for name, email, phone, property address or general area, service needed, optional photos, and additional details.

faqs.question: How can I contact Urban Yards?
faqs.answer: You can contact Urban Yards through the quote form, by phone at (971) 258-1109, or by email at team@urbanyards.us.
